query: SELECT p.id as pipelineId, p.name as pipelineName, p.account_id, ps.id as stageId, ps.name as stageName FROM pipelines p LEFT JOIN pipeline_stages ps ON ps.pipeline_id = p.id ORDER BY p.account_id, p.id, ps.sort_order
